title: DocRevision
description: An append-only revision record for a Document node — created by document.ingest or document.sync when file content differs from the graph (agency/capabilities/document/_main.py; Spec 292 keep-both bi-temporal reconciliation + Spec 153 Slice 6). Each DocRevision preserves the full content_sha at that point in time; latest recorded_at wins on read.

source.description: Which surface authored this revision: 'graph' (verb-rendered) or 'file' (disk edit ingested by document.sync).

content_sha.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the revision's rendered content at the time of recording.
